name: Portfolio
description: Single-page brand landing site with stunning hero, feature showcase, social proof, and conversion-focused layout.
personality: Bold, expressive portfolio that lets the work shine. Large hero with confident typography and a strong CTA. Project showcases use generous whitespace and full-bleed imagery. Subtle scroll-triggered animations add polish without distraction. Social proof and testimonials provide credibility. The overall feel is curated gallery meets personal brand statement.

voice.tone: Confident and personal. First-person where appropriate. Speaks with authority about craft.
voice.empty_states: Minimal and intentional. A portfolio with no projects yet should feel like a canvas waiting to be filled, with a prompt to add the first piece.
voice.errors: Brief and low-key. Contact form errors should guide without breaking the creative flow.
voice.loading: Fade-in content blocks with subtle opacity transitions. No spinners — the portfolio should feel curated, not loading.
